metadata.statute: 12 O.S. §727.1 (4.13% personal injury); 23 O.S. §6 + 15 O.S. §266 (6% contract)

annual_rate.notes: Oklahoma prejudgment interest splits by claim type: personal-injury / personal-rights verdicts bear a variable rate (currently 4.13%) set annually under 12 O.S. §727.1; contract / liquidated 'damages certain' claims bear 6% fixed (23 O.S. §6; 15 O.S. §266). Current PI value as of 2026-01-02; verify at oscn.net. Not legal advice.
